Our Story

About Us

7
Days a Week · Open for You

Tuscaloosa's Favorite

Your Beauty,
Our Passion

Welcome to Bama Tan Salon & Boutique — Tuscaloosa's go-to destination for tanning, hair, nails, lashes, and boutique shopping. Conveniently located at 2337 University Blvd E, we've built our reputation on exceptional service and a genuine love for helping clients look and feel their absolute best.

Whether you're chasing a sun-kissed glow before a big event, refreshing your hair color, getting a flawless set of lashes, or browsing our boutique for the latest styles — we've got you. Our women-owned business is a proud member of the Chamber of Commerce of West Alabama.

We believe beauty is for everyone, and we're dedicated to creating a space where you feel pampered, at home, and confident from the moment you walk in.

Book Your Visit · 205-462-2115

What We Stand For

Our Values

We're more than a salon. We're a place where confidence is built, community matters, and every client leaves feeling their best.

Client-First Service

Every appointment is personal. We listen, we care, and we deliver results that exceed your expectations every time.

Quality & Expertise

Our stylists and technicians are passionate about their craft, using premium products and the latest techniques.

Community Roots

As a local, women-owned business in Tuscaloosa, we're proud to support the West Alabama community.

A Welcoming Space

Clean, friendly, and always warm — our salon is your comfort zone. You belong here.

The Experts Behind Your Glow

Meet Our Team

Our talented professionals are here to make every visit exceptional.

What We Offer

Our Services

☀️

Tanning Services

UV Tanning · Spray Tanning · Airbrush · Red Light Therapy

UV Tanning Beds

Multiple bed levels available. Single sessions and monthly packages.

Call for Pricing

Mystic Spray Tan

Automated booth for a quick, even, streak-free glow.

Call for Pricing

Custom Airbrush Tan

Hand-applied by a technician for a flawless, natural-looking tan.

Call for Pricing

Red Light Therapy

Rejuvenate skin, reduce inflammation, and boost collagen.

Call for Pricing

Unlimited Tanning Memberships

Monthly packages — great value with no long-term contracts.

Call for Pricing

Tanning Lotions & Products

Premium accelerators and bronzers available in-salon.

Available In-Store

Heads up: Tanning bed availability is limited — we recommend calling ahead to reserve your spot at 205-462-2115. Perfect for weddings, prom, vacations, and everyday glow goals!

✂

Hair Salon

Cuts · Color · Extensions · Styling · Beard Trims

Women's Haircut & Style

Cut, blow-dry, and style tailored to your face shape and vision.

Call for Pricing

Men's Haircut

Precision cuts — fade, taper, classic, and more.

Call for Pricing

Beard Trim & Shape

Expert beard shaping and grooming for a clean, polished finish.

Call for Pricing

Hair Coloring

Single process, highlights, balayage, ombre, color correction.

Call for Pricing

Hair Extensions

Add length, volume, and dimension with professional extensions.

Call for Pricing

Blowout & Special Occasion

Event-ready blowouts and styling for weddings, prom, and more.

Call for Pricing

Appointments recommended for color services. Some require a prior consultation. Call 205-462-2115 to book.

💅

Nails & Lashes

Manicures · Pedicures · Lash Extensions

Manicure

Classic or gel — shaped, buffed, and polished to perfection.

Call for Pricing

Pedicure

Relaxing foot soak, nail care, and polish.

Call for Pricing

Lash Extensions — Classic

One extension per natural lash for a natural, lengthened look.

Call for Pricing

Lash Extensions — Volume

Multiple extensions per lash for a fuller, dramatic effect.

Call for Pricing

Lash Extensions — Hybrid

A blend of classic and volume for a textured look.

Call for Pricing

Lash Fills

Maintain your lash set with a regular fill appointment.

Call for Pricing

🌿

Skin Care & Waxing

Facials · Facial Waxing · Body Waxing · Skin Treatments

Eyebrow Wax & Shape

Precisely shaped brows to frame and define your face.

Call for Pricing

Full Face Wax

Upper lip, chin, cheeks, and full facial waxing.

Call for Pricing

Body Waxing

Arms, legs, underarms, bikini, and more.

Call for Pricing

Skin Care Treatments

Customized facial treatments for glowing, radiant skin.
